pi_items.source: Downloaded Linux_RAS_v66.zip and verified it does not contain any .g04 file for the Muncie model. The setup_task.sh script explicitly checks for this missing file and fatally exits.
Task instructions and export_result.sh explicitly expect the GeoJSON output at this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real HEC-RAS Muncie Example Model. I verified the expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/model_geometry.geojson. However, I discovered a fatal defect: the required input file /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.g04 does NOT exist in the environment. The Linux HEC-RAS distribution (Linux_RAS_v66.zip) only contains processed compute files (.x04, .b04, .r04, .hdf) and lacks the plain text .g04 geometry file. The setup_task.sh script explicitly checks for this missing file and fatally exits with a critical error, rendering the task impossible to complete.
